text.value: The HTML fragment 'ip-statements.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

Conformance resource C:\Users\amrit.palaria\Documents\code\IG\314e-ig\fsh-generated\resources\CodeSystem-attachment-tag.json - the canonical URL (http://314e.com/fhir/ig/CodeSystem/attachment-tag) does not match the URL (http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/attachment-tag). Published code systems SHOULD conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present

The System URI could not be determined for the code 'path-logo' in the ValueSet 'http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/ValueSet/ig-parameters|1.1.2'

The value provided ('path-logo') was not found in the value set 'ig-parameters Codes ValueSet' (http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/ValueSet/ig-parameters|1.1.2), and a code is required from this value set (error message = The System URI could not be determined for the code 'path-logo' in the ValueSet 'http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/ValueSet/ig-parameters|1.1.2'; The provided code '#path-logo' was not found in the value set 'http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/ValueSet/ig-parameters|1.1.2')

Error in constraint 'coding314e-3' with expression 'coding.where(system.exists()) .where(system.endsWith('-InternalCode')) .all(system.matches('^[^-]+-[^-]+-[^-]+-[^-]+-[^-]+-[^-]+-InternalCode$'))': Error evaluating FHIRPath expression: The name 'coding' is not valid for any of the possible types: [http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/uri] (@char 1)
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this data type profile

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/quantity-precision'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.2.0', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.1.0-cibuild (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.1.0-snapshot1), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/quantity-precision' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/quantity-precision|5.2.0'

The extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/regex|5.2.0 is deprecated with the note: 'This was deprecated in favor of using a constraint on the element using FHIRPath, since constraints allow for the provision of a human readable message associated with the regex'

Wrong Display Name 'Functional & Physiological Studies' for http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/procedure-category-314e#FNP. Valid display is 'Functional & Physiological Studies (Non-Invasive)' (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
Published value sets SHOULD conform to the ShareableValueSet profile, which says that the element ValueSet.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present
URL Mismatch http://314e.com/fhir/ig/ValueSet/procedure-category-broad-314e vs http://314e.com/fhir/ValueSet/procedure-category-broad-314e
